message.content:
If you want **Woodhouse Spa alternatives in Katy/Houston**, the closest matches in your search results are **Spavia Cinco Ranch** and **All Is Well Massage & Spa** in Katy, plus **Holistique Healing Spa** for more therapeutic/bodywork-focused services.[2][4][1]

- **Spavia Cinco Ranch** is the most direct “day spa” alternative, with **massage, facials, body treatments, and waxing** in Katy.[2]
- **All Is Well Massage & Spa** is a Katy option centered on **holistic massage and organic skincare**, including **Swedish, deep tissue, and couples massage**.[4]
- **Holistique Healing Spa** is a stronger fit if you want more **therapeutic** services such as **myofascial/sports massage, reflexology, hot stone add-ons, cupping, and sauna**.[1]
- **Gangnam Spa** is farther from a standard day-spa experience and is more of a **luxury sauna/baths/lounge** destination in Houston, with **massages and body scrubs** by appointment.[3]
- **Sapphira Privé MedSpa** is more of a **medical spa** than a traditional relaxation spa, so it is better if you want med-spa treatments rather than a classic Woodhouse-style visit.[6]

If your priority is:
- **Closest to Woodhouse’s full-service day-spa feel:** **Spavia Cinco Ranch**.[2]
- **Relaxation + massage/facial focus in Katy:** **All Is Well Massage & Spa**.[4]
- **Therapeutic massage and wellness treatments:** **Holistique Healing Spa**.[1]
- **Sauna/bathhouse-style spa day in Houston:** **Gangnam Spa**.[3]

I can also narrow these down by **budget**, **couples massage**, **facials**, or **luxury level** if you want a shorter recommendation list.
